## Problem / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? What HelloAsso capability is missing?

## Proposed solution
Describe the API or behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context
Links to relevant HelloAsso API documentation, examples, etc.
